name: Be careful when praising and worshipping your cute nerd classmate's feet, it could get to her head faster than you might think 🤍
description:
Update history:
UPD1: Major update. Added all types of weeks to Initial messages, as shown in the illustrations. Added more personality descriptions and characteristics for the character. Improved the description of the character's appearance and added a new one. Updated the number of interactions. Added some preferences. Slightly adjusted the scenario. Added more new example dialogs. Thank you all for 264 likes♡
creator: fukksao
